vocab.example: My friends and I would often indulge in make-believe games, pretending to be explorers in a lost jungle.

vocab.meaning: những nỗ lực/hoạt động sáng tạo nghệ thuật
vocab.example: My weekends were predominantly occupied with various artistic endeavors, from finger painting to building clay models.

vocab.meaning: những cảm xúc phấn khích gián tiếp (qua việc đọc/xem)
vocab.example: I sought vicarious thrills through adventure novels, traveling to distant lands without ever leaving my bedroom.
The local park was the perfect setting for our boisterous play, where we would run and shout until sunset.

vocab.meaning: một cảm giác kinh ngạc/ngỡ ngàng
vocab.example: Watching the caterpillars in my garden transform into butterflies filled me with a profound sense of wonderment.
Solving intricate puzzles and riddles provided the intellectual stimulation I craved as a curious child.

vocab.meaning: giá trị về mặt tình cảm
vocab.example: Collecting seashells might seem trivial, but those small items hold immense sentimental value for me now.
The traditional street games we played fostered a strong communal spirit among all the children in the neighborhood.

vocab.meaning: học hỏi thông qua vận động/thực hành
vocab.example: I gravitated toward kinesthetic learning, so taking apart old gadgets to see how they worked was a favorite pastime.

vocab.meaning: những ngày tháng huy hoàng/êm đềm trong quá khứ
vocab.example: I often look back on those halcyon days when my only responsibility was deciding which game to play next.
